settings.title: Fresh, every day
settings.text: Farm-fresh produce delivered each morning for the best quality.

settings.title: A world of flavour
settings.text: A huge range of international groceries from across Asia and beyond.

settings.title: Unbeatable value
settings.text: Strong supplier relationships mean real savings passed on to you.

settings.title: Serving the community
settings.text: MCQ builds a loyal following across Perth for fresh produce and international groceries.

settings.title: A growing network
settings.text: Operating strongly across multiple Western Australian locations — Malaga, Morley, Armadale, Subiaco and Mirrabooka.

settings.title: Going digital
settings.text: MCQ launches a brand-new digital experience powered by Shopify and LS Retail.

settings.heading: Unbeatable value, fresh every day
settings.text: Five stores across Perth, open 7 days at most locations. We can't wait to welcome you in-store.
